subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! That which thou didst write and intend hath been made manifest and unveiled. Verily, man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی آنچه نگاشتی و مقصود داشتی مشهود و مکشوف شد فی الحقیقه انسان
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @spiritual transformation, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @attaining the life of the spirit, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
